name: 安东尼·皮埃尔·克里斯托弗
name_full: 安东尼·皮埃尔·克里斯托弗 Anthony Pierre Christopher

last_movies.title: 潜能探案组 第一季
紧急呼救：孤星 第五季
美国恐怖故事 第十季

introduction: A West Coast native with roots in the Bayou, his early memory of asking and being granted the opportunity to sing at his church at the age of six, started his passion for performance. Years later a fellow church member told his family of the Northwest School of the Arts and suggested he apply. It was there he was exposed to various disciplines within the Arts (Theater, Singing and Dance) and it was there where he was able to refine his skills.Through college (Jackson State University) he participated in many groups and performances, and although graduating with a Bachelor of Science degree in Chemistry, he maintained his passion.While living in Chicago Anthony further honed his skills performing in several Theater productions as well as numerous Commercials and Industrials. Whether on the West Coast (Los Angeles), East Coast (New York), "3rd" Coast (Chicago) or Deep South, he is a face and personality to be remembered.
